seo.title: React 19 for React (general)
seo.description: How React 19 fits into real React (general) workflows.

content.headline: React State Management Strategy Generator
content.description: Determines optimal state management approach based on project requirements and team constraints

examples.label: Small project with TypeScript
examples.expected_output: {"recommendation": "React Context API with Zustand for simplicity"}

examples.label: Large enterprise app
examples.expected_output: {"recommendation": "Redux Toolkit with React Query for scalability"}

examples.label: Medium app with server state
examples.expected_output: {"recommendation": "React Server Components with Suspense for data fetching"}

content.how_it_works: Evaluates project size, team expertise, and technical requirements to recommend context API, redux, Zustand, or server components. Prioritizes simplicity for small projects and scalability for enterprise apps.
